text.title: Email Lifecycle Architecture Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Are ≥3 email programs running AND ≥1000 subscribers OR ≥100 tx/day?

branch.question: Does the founder hold authority to consolidate sender + suppression?
